mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_metadata (id, tenant_id, storage_type, object_key, original_filename, content_type, extension, size, status, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by, version) VALUES (#{metadata.id}, #{metadata.tenantId}, #{metadata.storageType}, #{metadata.objectKey}, #{metadata.originalFilename}, #{metadata.contentType}, #{metadata.extension}, #{metadata.size}, #{metadata.status}, #{metadata.createdAt}, #{metadata.createdBy}, #{metadata.updatedAt}, #{metadata.updatedBy}, #{metadata.deleted}, #{metadata.deletedAt}, #{metadata.deletedBy}, #{metadata.version})
mapper.update: UPDATE file_metadata SET storage_type = #{storageType}, object_key = #{objectKey}, size = #{size}, status = 'AVAILABLE', updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, version = version + 1 WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 AND version = #{version} AND status = 'UPLOADING'
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM file_metadata
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE file_metadata SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, updated_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_by = #{deletedBy}, version = version + 1 WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 AND version = #{version} AND status IN ('AVAILABLE', 'DELETE_FAILED')
